title: Amtech H0900 3 Piece Centre Punch Set
features: DURABLE: This centre punch set is made from heat treated carbon steel for strength and durability
EASY TO USE: With ribbed, non-slip grips and knurled bodies with square striking heads, the punches are designed to easily set nails and brads for a smooth finish
SIZES: 100mm (4") in length, the set includes sizes 1/16", 3/32", 1/8"
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 3Pc Centre Punch Set See more
